---
title: Email Template
description: Standard template for email communications
---

## Subject line

Keep subject lines under 60 characters. Be specific about the content.

## Body structure

1. **Greeting** — Address the recipient by name when possible.
2. **Context** — One sentence explaining why you're writing.
3. **Details** — The main content, using bullets for multiple points.
4. **Action** — Clear next step or call to action.
5. **Sign-off** — Professional closing.
